mapper.select:
select seq , dir , use_yn AS useYn , DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS createdAt , DATE_FORMAT(updated_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as updatedAt , category ,( SELECT count(tud.dir) FROM TB_CS_UPLOAD_DIR tud ) AS hiddenCount from TB_CS_UPLOAD_DIR order by seq DESC
limit #{offsetPageable.offset}, #{offsetPageable.pageSize}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_CS_UPLOAD_DIR ( dir, use_yn , category) VALUES ( #{uploadDir},#{uploadDirUseYn} ,#{uploadDirCategory});
mapper.select: select dir , use_yn AS useYn , category from TB_CS_UPLOAD_DIR where dir = #{uploadDir}
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_CS_UPLOAD_DIR SET use_yn = 'N' WHERE category = 'train'
UPDATE TB_CS_UPLOAD_DIR SET use_yn = 'N' WHERE category = 'test'
